title: Add end-to-end smoke test: seeded vault → Kioku index → search returns hits
acceptance_criteria: A new describe block or test file exists at app/server/services/kioku/integration.test.ts (extend existing) or app/server/api/kioku/search.smoke.test.ts.

Test 1: reads the real vault using readCanonicalVaultReadModel(resolveVaultWorkspaceRoot()), syncs into an in-memory createKiokuStorage(':memory:'), then calls storage.search() with a keyword that appears in at least one seeded task title — asserts hits.length > 0.
Test 2: calls storage.search() with a keyword that does not appear in any seeded task (e.g. 'xyzzy_nonexistent_keyword') — asserts hits.length === 0.
Test 3: all returned hits have entityType === 'task'.
bun test with the relevant test file path passes with 0 failures.
The test does NOT mock readCanonicalVaultReadModel — it reads the actual vault files on disk.
completion_summary: Extended Kioku integration coverage with a real-vault smoke test that syncs seeded data into in-memory storage and asserts known hits, misses, and task-only results.
